PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/App.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes"; if \($r.Content -match 'Button'\) { Write-Output "Contains 'Button': YES" } else { Write-Output "Contains 'Button': NO" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/components/ui/button.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "button.jsx status: $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "button.jsx error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/assets/main.css" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "main.css status: $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes"; if \($r.Content -match 'tailwindcss'\) { Write-Output "main.css refs tailwindcss: YES" } } catch { Write-Output "main.css error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/App.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match 'Gesti'\) { Write-Output "Has 'Gesti': YES" }; if \($r.Content -match 'h-screen'\) { Write-Output "Has 'h-screen': YES" }; if \($r.Content -match 'text-5xl'\) { Write-Output "Has 'text-5xl': YES" }; Write-Output "---first 500 chars of transformed App.jsx---"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\))

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5173"; $paths = @\("/src/App.jsx","/src/components/Sidebar.jsx","/src/pages/Inicio.jsx","/src/pages/Pacientes.jsx","/src/pages/Alumnos.jsx","/src/pages/Grupos.jsx","/src/pages/Pagos.jsx","/src/pages/Reportes.jsx","/src/pages/Configuracion.jsx","/src/assets/main.css"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("{0,-45} {1} {2} bytes" -f $p, $r.StatusCode, $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Output \("{0,-45} ERROR {1}" -f $p, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5173"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/src/App.jsx" -UseBasicParsing; foreach \($needle in @\('MemoryRouter','Sidebar','Inicio','Pacientes','Alumnos','Grupos','Pagos','Reportes','Configuracion','/configuracion','overflow-y-auto','flex-1'\)\) { if \($r.Content -match [regex]::Escape\($needle\)\) { Write-Output "App.jsx contains '$needle': YES" } else { Write-Output "App.jsx contains '$needle': NO" } })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5173"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/src/components/Sidebar.jsx" -UseBasicParsing; foreach \($needle in @\('NavLink','LayoutDashboard','UserRound','GraduationCap','CreditCard','FileText','Settings','bg-sidebar','text-sidebar-foreground','bg-sidebar-accent','text-sidebar-primary','w-[220px]','border-sidebar-border'\)\) { if \($r.Content -match [regex]::Escape\($needle\)\) { Write-Output "Sidebar.jsx contains '$needle': YES" } else { Write-Output "Sidebar.jsx contains '$needle': NO" } })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5173"; $css = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/src/assets/main.css" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; foreach \($needle in @\('.bg-sidebar','.text-sidebar-foreground','.bg-sidebar-accent','.text-sidebar-primary','.border-sidebar-border','.w-\\[220px\\]','.flex-1','.overflow-y-auto'\)\) { if \($css -match $needle\) { Write-Output "main.css compiled '$needle': YES" } else { Write-Output "main.css compiled '$needle': NO" } })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5173"; $paths = @\("/src/App.jsx","/src/pages/Grupos.jsx","/src/components/Sidebar.jsx","/src/assets/main.css"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("{0,-40} {1} {2} bytes" -f $p, $r.StatusCode, $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Output \("{0,-40} ERROR {1}" -f $p, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5173"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/src/pages/Grupos.jsx" -UseBasicParsing; $needles = @\('window.api.grupos','grupos.list','grupos.create','grupos.update','grupos.deactivate','TIENE_ALUMNOS_ACTIVOS','Modal','buildTitulo','formMode','confirmGrupo','confirmBlocked'\); foreach \($n in $needles\) { if \($r.Content -match [regex]::Escape\($n\)\) { Write-Output "Grupos.jsx: '$n' YES" } else { Write-Output "Grupos.jsx: '$n' NO" } })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5173"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/src/pages/Clientes.jsx" -UseBasicParsing; foreach \($n in @\('window.api.pacientes','window.api.alumnos','window.api.grupos','filosofia','buildClientes','RoleBadge','ClientForm','EmptyState','onTipoClaseChange','DNI_DUPLICADO','PACIENTE_YA_EXISTE','ALUMNO_YA_EXISTE','tiene_alumno','tiene_paciente','MemoryRouter'\)\) { if \($r.Content -match [regex]::Escape\($n\)\) { Write-Output "Clientes.jsx: '$n' YES" } else { Write-Output "Clientes.jsx: '$n' NO" } })

PowerShell($db = "$env:APPDATA\\gestion-contable\\gestion-contable.db"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($db\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $start = $text.IndexOf\("CREATE TABLE alumnos"\); if \($start -ge 0\) { $end = $text.IndexOf\("\)", $start\); Write-Output "alumnos schema \(raw fragment from DB\):"; Write-Output $text.Substring\($start, $end - $start + 1\) } else { Write-Output "alumnos table not found" })
